# Thailand Administrative Divisions — Full Reference

> Last updated: 2026-06-01. License: CC-BY-4.0.

## Per-Province Data Files

- [Bangkok](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/bangkok-10.txt) — 50 districts, 154 subdistricts
- [Samut Prakan](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/samut-prakan-11.txt) — 6 districts, 50 subdistricts
- [Nonthaburi](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/nonthaburi-12.txt) — 6 districts, 52 subdistricts
- [Pathum Thani](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/pathum-thani-13.txt) — 7 districts, 60 subdistricts
- [Phra Nakhon Si Ayutthaya](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/phra-nakhon-si-ayutthaya-14.txt) — 16 districts, 207 subdistricts
- [Ang Thong](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/ang-thong-15.txt) — 7 districts, 73 subdistricts
- [Loburi](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/loburi-16.txt) — 11 districts, 121 subdistricts
- [Sing Buri](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/sing-buri-17.txt) — 6 districts, 43 subdistricts
- [Chai Nat](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/chai-nat-18.txt) — 8 districts, 53 subdistricts
- [Saraburi](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/saraburi-19.txt) — 13 districts, 109 subdistricts
- [Chon Buri](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/chon-buri-20.txt) — 11 districts, 92 subdistricts
- [Rayong](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/rayong-21.txt) — 8 districts, 56 subdistricts
- [Chanthaburi](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/chanthaburi-22.txt) — 10 districts, 76 subdistricts
- [Trat](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/trat-23.txt) — 7 districts, 37 subdistricts
- [Chachoengsao](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/chachoengsao-24.txt) — 11 districts, 93 subdistricts
- [Prachin Buri](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/prachin-buri-25.txt) — 7 districts, 64 subdistricts
- [Nakhon Nayok](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/nakhon-nayok-26.txt) — 4 districts, 41 subdistricts
- [Sa Kaeo](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/sa-kaeo-27.txt) — 9 districts, 59 subdistricts
- [Nakhon Ratchasima](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/nakhon-ratchasima-30.txt) — 32 districts, 285 subdistricts
- [Buri Ram](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/buri-ram-31.txt) — 23 districts, 189 subdistricts
- [Surin](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/surin-32.txt) — 17 districts, 159 subdistricts
- [Si Sa Ket](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/si-sa-ket-33.txt) — 22 districts, 204 subdistricts
- [Ubon Ratchathani](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/ubon-ratchathani-34.txt) — 25 districts, 219 subdistricts
- [Yasothon](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/yasothon-35.txt) — 9 districts, 79 subdistricts
- [Chaiyaphum](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/chaiyaphum-36.txt) — 16 districts, 124 subdistricts
- [Amnat Charoen](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/amnat-charoen-37.txt) — 7 districts, 56 subdistricts
- [Buogkan](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/buogkan-38.txt) — 8 districts, 53 subdistricts
- [Nong Bua Lam Phu](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/nong-bua-lam-phu-39.txt) — 6 districts, 59 subdistricts
- [Khon Kaen](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/khon-kaen-40.txt) — 26 districts, 199 subdistricts
- [Udon Thani](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/udon-thani-41.txt) — 20 districts, 155 subdistricts
- [Loei](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/loei-42.txt) — 14 districts, 90 subdistricts
- [Nong Khai](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/nong-khai-43.txt) — 9 districts, 62 subdistricts
- [Maha Sarakham](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/maha-sarakham-44.txt) — 13 districts, 133 subdistricts
- [Roi Et](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/roi-et-45.txt) — 20 districts, 192 subdistricts
- [Kalasin](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/kalasin-46.txt) — 18 districts, 134 subdistricts
- [Sakon Nakhon](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/sakon-nakhon-47.txt) — 18 districts, 125 subdistricts

- [Chiang Mai](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/chiang-mai-50.txt) — 25 districts, 199 subdistricts
- [Lamphun](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/lamphun-51.txt) — 8 districts, 51 subdistricts

- [Phrae](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/phrae-54.txt) — 8 districts, 78 subdistricts
- [Nan](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/nan-55.txt) — 15 districts, 99 subdistricts
- [Phayao](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/phayao-56.txt) — 9 districts, 68 subdistricts
- [Chiang Rai](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/chiang-rai-57.txt) — 18 districts, 123 subdistricts
- [Mae Hong Son](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/mae-hong-son-58.txt) — 7 districts, 44 subdistricts
- [Nakhon Sawan](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/nakhon-sawan-60.txt) — 15 districts, 130 subdistricts
- [Uthai Thani](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/uthai-thani-61.txt) — 8 districts, 69 subdistricts
- [Kamphaeng Phet](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/kamphaeng-phet-62.txt) — 11 districts, 78 subdistricts
- [Tak](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/tak-63.txt) — 9 districts, 60 subdistricts
- [Sukhothai](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/sukhothai-64.txt) — 9 districts, 86 subdistricts
- [Phitsanulok](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/phitsanulok-65.txt) — 9 districts, 93 subdistricts
- [Phichit](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/phichit-66.txt) — 12 districts, 88 subdistricts
- [Phetchabun](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/phetchabun-67.txt) — 11 districts, 116 subdistricts
- [Ratchaburi](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/ratchaburi-70.txt) — 10 districts, 104 subdistricts
- [Kanchanaburi](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/kanchanaburi-71.txt) — 13 districts, 95 subdistricts
- [Suphan Buri](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/suphan-buri-72.txt) — 10 districts, 109 subdistricts
- [Nakhon Pathom](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/nakhon-pathom-73.txt) — 7 districts, 106 subdistricts
- [Samut Sakhon](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/samut-sakhon-74.txt) — 3 districts, 40 subdistricts
- [Samut Songkhram](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/samut-songkhram-75.txt) — 3 districts, 36 subdistricts
- [Phetchaburi](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/phetchaburi-76.txt) — 8 districts, 92 subdistricts
- [Prachuap Khiri Khan](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/prachuap-khiri-khan-77.txt) — 8 districts, 48 subdistricts
- [Nakhon Si Thammarat](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/nakhon-si-thammarat-80.txt) — 23 districts, 169 subdistricts
- [Krabi](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/krabi-81.txt) — 8 districts, 52 subdistricts
- [Phangnga](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/phangnga-82.txt) — 8 districts, 48 subdistricts
- [Phuket](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/phuket-83.txt) — 3 districts, 16 subdistricts
- [Surat Thani](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/surat-thani-84.txt) — 19 districts, 130 subdistricts
- [Ranong](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/ranong-85.txt) — 5 districts, 30 subdistricts
- [Chumphon](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/chumphon-86.txt) — 8 districts, 70 subdistricts
- [Songkhla](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/songkhla-90.txt) — 16 districts, 127 subdistricts
- [Satun](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/satun-91.txt) — 7 districts, 36 subdistricts
- [Trang](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/trang-92.txt) — 10 districts, 90 subdistricts
- [Phatthalung](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/phatthalung-93.txt) — 11 districts, 65 subdistricts
- [Pattani](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/pattani-94.txt) — 12 districts, 115 subdistricts
- [Yala](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/yala-95.txt) — 8 districts, 58 subdistricts
- [Narathiwat](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/narathiwat-96.txt) — 13 districts, 77 subdistricts

## Summary

| Province | Districts | Subdistricts | 
|---|---|---|
| Bangkok | 50 | 154 | 
| Samut Prakan | 6 | 50 | 
| Nonthaburi | 6 | 52 | 
| Pathum Thani | 7 | 60 | 
| Phra Nakhon Si Ayutthaya | 16 | 207 | 
| Ang Thong | 7 | 73 | 
| Loburi | 11 | 121 | 
| Sing Buri | 6 | 43 | 
| Chai Nat | 8 | 53 | 
| Saraburi | 13 | 109 | 
| Chon Buri | 11 | 92 | 
| Rayong | 8 | 56 | 
| Chanthaburi | 10 | 76 | 
| Trat | 7 | 37 | 
| Chachoengsao | 11 | 93 | 
| Prachin Buri | 7 | 64 | 
| Nakhon Nayok | 4 | 41 | 
| Sa Kaeo | 9 | 59 | 
| Nakhon Ratchasima | 32 | 285 | 
| Buri Ram | 23 | 189 | 
| Surin | 17 | 159 | 
| Si Sa Ket | 22 | 204 | 
| Ubon Ratchathani | 25 | 219 | 
| Yasothon | 9 | 79 | 
| Chaiyaphum | 16 | 124 | 
| Amnat Charoen | 7 | 56 | 
| Buogkan | 8 | 53 | 
| Nong Bua Lam Phu | 6 | 59 | 
| Khon Kaen | 26 | 199 |

| Loei | 14 | 90 | 
| Nong Khai | 9 | 62 |

| Lampang | 13 | 97 |

| Phetchabun | 11 | 116 |
